title: seseli carvi
intro: Seseli carvi, also known as wild caraway, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to Europe and Asia, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant's essential oil contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate digestive issues, relieve pain, and soothe respiratory problems. Seseli carvi is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or infusion, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
